# 参考文献 {-}

```{bibtex}
#| echo: false
#| file: references.bib

@article{modigliani1958,
  title={The cost of capital, corporation finance and the theory of investment},
  author={Modigliani, Franco and Miller, Merton H},
  journal={American economic review},
  volume={48},
  number={3},
  pages={261--297},
  year={1958},
  publisher={JSTOR}
}

@article{myers1984,
  title={Corporate financing and investment decisions when firms have information that investors do not have},
  author={Myers, Stewart C and Majluf, Nicholas S},
  journal={Journal of financial economics},
  volume={13},
  number={2},
  pages={187--221},
  year={1984},
  publisher={Elsevier}
}

@article{hansen1999,
  title={Threshold effects in non-dynamic panels: Estimation, testing, and inference},
  author={Hansen, Bruce E},
  journal={Journal of econometrics},
  volume={93},
  number={2},
  pages={345--368},
  year={1999},
  publisher={Elsevier}
}

@article{bai2009,
  title={Panel data models with interactive fixed effects},
  author={Bai, Jushan},
  journal={Econometrica},
  volume={77},
  number={4},
  pages={1229--1279},
  year={2009},
  publisher={Wiley Online Library}
}

@article{titman1988,
  title={The determinants of capital structure choice},
  author={Titman, Sheridan and Wessels, Roberto},
  journal={The Journal of finance},
  volume={43},
  number={1},
  pages={1--19},
  year={1988},
  publisher={Wiley Online Library}
}

@article{rajan1995,
  title={What do we know about capital structure? Some evidence from international data},
  author={Rajan, Raghuram G and Zingales, Luigi},
  journal={The journal of Finance},
  volume={50},
  number={5},
  pages={1421--1460},
  year={1995},
  publisher={Wiley Online Library}
}

@article{fama1998,
  title={Testing trade-off and pecking order predictions about dividends and debt},
  author={Fama, Eugene F and French, Kenneth R},
  journal={The Review of Financial Studies},
  volume={11},
  number={4},
  pages={685--693},
  year={1998},
  publisher={Society for Financial Studies}
}

@article{chen2004,
  title={Managerial incentives, stock ownership, and capital structure: Evidence from China},
  author={Chen, Kevin Cheng Yuan and Yuan, Hongqi and Chen, Zhihong},
  journal={Available at SSRN 606422},
  year={2004}
}

@article{li2010,
  title={State ownership, financial institution ownership, and dividend policy: Evidence from China},
  author={Li, K and Wang, T and Cheung, YL and Jiang, P},
  journal={International Review of Economics and Finance},
  year={2010}
}

@article{qian2009,
  title={The effect of exogenous enforcement on financial institutions and markets: Evidence from China},
  author={Qian, Jun and Strahan, Philip E},
  journal={American Economic Review},
  volume={99},
  number={2},
  pages={262--66},
  year={2009}
}

@book{wooldridge2010,
  title={Econometric analysis of cross section and panel data},
  author={Wooldridge, Jeffrey M},
  year={2010},
  publisher={MIT press}
}

@article{arellano1991,
  title={Some tests of specification for panel data: Monte Carlo evidence and an application to employment equations},
  author={Arellano, Miguel and Bond, Stephen},
  journal={The Review of Economic Studies},
  volume={58},
  number={2},
  pages={277--297},
  year={1991},
  publisher={Oxford University Press}
}

@article{blundell1998,
  title={Initial conditions and moment restrictions in dynamic panel data models},
  author={Blundell, Richard and Bond, Stephen},
  journal={Journal of econometrics},
  volume={87},
  number={1},
  pages={115--143},
  year={1998},
  publisher={Elsevier}
}
```
